concerns: Findings: [Missing measurements for l2_cache_size_mb and actual_boost_clock_mhz]
Concerns: [Only dram_latency_cycles was measured out of three requested targets. The measurement pipeline failed to complete the full measurement suite.]

The verification shows that only 1 out of 3 requested targets was measured. The requested targets were ['dram_latency_cycles', 'l2_cache_size_mb', 'actual_boost_clock_mhz'], but only dram_latency_cycles (451.0 cycles) was successfully measured. Two targets are completely missing from the results.

While the measured dram_latency_cycles value of 451 cycles falls within the expected GPU DRAM latency range (300-1000 cycles), the incomplete measurement set violates the completeness requirement. According to the verification protocol, if any requested target is missing from measurements, the verdict must be REJECT.
The pipeline appears to have encountered execution failures (as evidenced by the emergency stall recovery messages and failed tool calls) that prevented completion of the full measurement suite.
methodology: GPU profiling pipeline targeting: dram_latency_cycles, l2_cache_size_mb, actual_boost_clock_mhz. Measurements collected via LLM-generated CUDA micro-benchmarks compiled with nvcc. Anti-optimization: volatile qualifiers, asm volatile memory barriers, #pragma unroll 1. Anti-cheat: no reliance on cudaGetDeviceProperties; all values empirically measured. Cross-validated with hardware probe measurements.
_quality_warnings: Zero measurements detected and REMOVED: num_tool_calls. This indicates measurement code is broken (clock64() not called, code optimized away).
Missing requested targets (not measured or filtered): actual_boost_clock_mhz, dram_latency_cycles, l2_cache_size_mb
